title: (Bearish Signal) GRVY, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on March 03, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that GRVY's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for GRVY, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 144 similar cases, 129 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $118.20 crossed the resistance line at $118.62 and is trading between $118.62 resistance and $115.02 support lines. Throughout the month of 01/29/21 - 03/03/21, the price experienced a -31% Downtrend. During the week of 02/24/21 - 03/03/21, the stock fell -4%.

https://preview.redd.it/h9t4dstz92l61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=008a8519500184c375e74fd3e1fb38f361fb95f2

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on February 11, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on GRVY as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 63 of 88 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 72%.

GRVY moved below its 50-day Moving Average on January 29, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for GRVY crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on January 29, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 14 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 86%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where GRVY declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator for GRVY entered a downward trend on March 03, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9667942-gravity-co-ltd-adr-s-grvy-124-5-aroon-indicator-entered-a-downtrend-on-march-03-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
